behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC Arcadion: it handles being examined (look), reacts when actors enter/leave a fast-trigger area, processes player 'use' interactions (opening gumps or starting dialog), runs complex area/item-handling behavior (patrol/quest logic), and performs spell casting by spawning a dedicated spell/combat process.

Dialog and service availability are gated by global flags (arcadionMet, gotTheSymbols, arcadionAvaName) and the NPC's alive/dead state; arcadionMet is set the first time the player receives Arcadion's introductory speech.

Cast actions (ARCADION::cast) prepare casting context (set info/process-exclude), push actor and parameters, spawn SPELCMBT::084D to perform the actual effect, and suspend until that spawned process finishes, returning its result.

enterFastArea responds to nearby actors: if the NPC is dead it does nothing; if avatarMasterSorcerer is set it sets the NPC's target to the entering actor, otherwise it spawns a MOVE behavior to make Arcadion move/respond.

A long behavior loop (ARCADION::0284) scans nearby items, builds temporary lists, pathfinds to found objects, possibly destroys or manipulates items, and issues barks (Item::bark) and METHOD::* spawns to effect environmental changes.
notable_control_flow: U8P_ARCADION::cast spawns SPELCMBT::084D with prepared info and suspends the caster process until the spawned process completes.
U8P_ARCADION::enterFastArea conditionally calls Npc::setTarget (if avatarMasterSorcerer set) or spawns MOVE::0080 for normal actors; it early-exits if Npc::isDead() is true.
U8P_ARCADION::use branches on NPC alive/dead: alive toggles or opens gumps (UI); dead triggers dialog flow by spawning U8P_ARCADION::054B, U8P_ARCADION::1256 and METHOD::* routines.

U8P_ARCADION::054B is the primary dialog routine: it reads arcadionMet (writes it on first meeting), reads player choice via FREE::1A85, and branches based on gotTheSymbols and arcadionAvaName to provide context-sensitive replies or services.

U8P_ARCADION::0284 runs a persistent loop that creates temporary item lists ([BP-0Ah]), pathfinds (Npc::pathfind), conditionally destroys Item instances, and spawns METHOD::* handlers to complete scripted actions.
Loop/frame progression inside U8P_ARCADION::0284; treated as control-flow, not explicit internal call.
open_questions: Exact behavior and side effects of spawned METHOD::* routines (METHOD::091C, METHOD::15E7, METHOD::0BCF, METHOD::1090) — they are likely to manipulate items/state or continue scripted sequences but their concrete effects are external to this script.

Precise meaning and game semantics of the 'info' id(s) set before spawning SPELCMBT::084D or during hatch-like operations (e.g., 0x210 referenced elsewhere) — inferred as state/exclusion markers but not fully documented here.
Exact semantics of avatarMasterSorcerer global flag (special player class/role?) and how it is set elsewhere in the game.
Detailed contents of the dialog text strings (Item::bark payloads) and how they map to quest progression beyond arcadionMet and gotTheSymbols.

main_function.name: U8P_ARCADION::cast
main_function.purpose: Handle Arcadion initiating a spell/combat action: prepare casting info/state for the target, pass the caster and spell/parameter, spawn the SPELCMBT::084D process to resolve the spell/combat, suspend until that process returns, and forward its result.
entry_conditions: Event 11 (U8P_ARCADION::cast) triggered by the engine when Arcadion attempts to U8P_ARCADION::cast/use a spell.
Requires a valid caster/process context (implicit PID passed in stack frame) and a spell_id parameter (uword) supplied by the caller.

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::cast
function_map.role: Spawn spell/combat handler for Arcadion's U8P_ARCADION::cast actions and wait for its result.

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::look
function_map.role: Produce Arcadion's examination/dialog bark; varies phrasing depending on arcadionName, arcadionJob, and Npc::isDead().

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Trigger when an actor enters Arcadion's fast-trigger area: set target for master sorcerer or spawn MOVE behavior for others; no-op if Arcadion is dead.

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Housekeeping/cleanup when an actor exits the fast-trigger area; calls FREE utilities to release area/process info.

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::use
function_map.role: Handle player 'use' interactions: toggles/opens UI gumps if alive; if dead, spawns dialog and additional scripted method handlers.

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::054B
function_map.role: Main dialog/meeting routine that delivers introductory speech (sets arcadionMet) or follows up based on player choices and flags (gotTheSymbols, arcadionAvaName).

function_map.name: U8P_ARCADION::0284
function_map.role: Long behavior loop implementing scanning of nearby items, building temporary lists, pathfinding to objects, destroying/manipulating items, and spawning methods — inferred patrol/quest logic.

internal_calls.purpose: Start the main dialog/meeting routine when interacting with a dead Arcadion (dialog branch), or otherwise continue conversation flow.
Spawn an additional Arcadion dialog/handler as part of the dead-NPC interaction sequence (exact role inferred from spawn chaining).

external_calls.purpose: Spawn the dedicated spell/combat handler to resolve the U8P_ARCADION::cast action; receives caster pid, spell/target parameter, and prepared info/process-exclude settings.
Check Arcadion's alive/dead state to choose appropriate description/dialog phrasing.
Emit the chosen text string to the player/viewer (make Arcadion 'speak' the description).
Set Arcadion's AI/combat target to the entering actor when avatarMasterSorcerer flag is set.
Spawn a movement behavior so Arcadion responds/moves toward the entering actor when they are not a special master sorcerer.
Clean up area/process tracking resources when an actor leaves the fast area.
Read player dialog choice/input to branch conversation paths within the meeting routine.
Request pathfinding/movement for Arcadion to approach items or locations discovered by the scan loop.
Remove or consume items discovered by the behavior loop as part of scripted interactions.
Spawn specialized handlers to perform further scripted actions on items or to complete multi-step behaviors; precise effects are external/inferred.
Open a UI gump for the player when using Arcadion while alive (toggle/display UI).
Close the UI gump when toggling interactions (complements openGump behavior).

reads.name: arcadionName
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether Arcadion's full name form is used in look/dialog variants (affects phrasing).

reads.name: arcadionJob
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether job/title text (e.g., 'daemon Sorcerer') is appended in look/dialog outputs.

reads.name: avatarMasterSorcerer
reads.likely_effect: Determines special behavior in enterFastArea (whether to set target directly instead of spawning MOVE behavior).

reads.name: gotTheSymbols
reads.likely_effect: Gates dialog/service branches in the main meeting routine (U8P_ARCADION::054B) and likely controls rewards/access.

reads.name: arcadionAvaName
reads.likely_effect: If present, used to personalize dialog lines referencing the avatar's name.

writes.name: arcadionMet
writes.likely_effect: Set to true when the player receives Arcadion's long introductory speech; records that the meeting has occurred and alters future dialog branches.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC Arcadion: it handles being examined (look), reacts when actors enter/leave a fast-trigger area, processes player 'use' interactions (opening gumps or starting dialog), runs complex area/item-handling behavior (patrol/quest logic), and performs spell casting by spawning a dedicated spell/combat process.
